creator: FreeBSD@ShaneWare.Biz
text:
Yes the current blender port fails with opencollada >= 1.6.65

The fix is included in the update patch at bug #225942 which needs to be done at the same time as the osl update due to the switch to using llvm60

The collada fix could be done separately, the blender update includes two patches for source_blender_collada_DocumentImporter.cpp and source_blender_collada_DocumentImporter.h
